Power City Builder Documentation

Welcome to the official documentation for Power City Builder v1.0.1. This is a stylized isometric city management game built with Pygame, featuring complex power grid simulation, citizen education systems, and dynamic satisfaction logic.

Getting Started

To run the game from source, ensure you have your Python environment active and install the dependencies:

pip install pygame-ce noise pathfinding-python

Then, launch the game:

python main.py
